small_wins_lead_to_big_changes_every_ins: "Small wins lead to big changes. Every insight makes you stronger."
Small wins lead to big changes. Every insight you carry forward makes you stronger.
notice_the_thought_and_label_it_gently_t: Notice the thought and label it gently: "This is an OCD thought."
allow_uncertainty_instead_of_trying_to_s: Allow uncertainty instead of trying to solve it immediately.
let_uncomfortable_feelings_exist_without: Let uncomfortable feelings exist without judging yourself for having them.
remind_yourself_that_thoughts_are_mental: Remind yourself that thoughts are mental events, not facts or intentions.
focus_on_what_you_are_doing_in_the_prese: Focus on what you are doing in the present moment, not on "what if" scenarios.
practice_slow_breathing_when_anxiety_ris: Practice slow breathing when anxiety rises — inhale slowly, exhale even slower.
keep_a_consistent_sleep_routine_to_suppo: Keep a consistent sleep routine to support emotional regulation.
eat_regular_balanced_meals_to_avoid_anxi: Eat regular, balanced meals to avoid anxiety spikes from low energy.
reduce_caffeine_if_you_notice_it_increas: Reduce caffeine if you notice it increases restlessness or intrusive thoughts.
be_kind_to_yourself__progress_in_ocd_rec: Be kind to yourself — progress in OCD recovery happens step by step, not perfectly.
small_wins_lead_to_big_changes_every_ins: Small wins lead to big changes. Every insight makes you stronger.
Small wins lead to big changes. Every insight you gain makes you stronger on your recovery journey.
